title: Chapter 300
content:
Chapter 300: Chapter 300 : Beautiful Hypocrisy

[System is enjoying the actions of the host and wishes him to go all out. As a reward, the system has granted an item. Check inventory.]

Jax instantly browsed his inventory and found it.

[Midnight Bunny Set x1]

[Outfit (Black / Casual Roleplay) — No magic embedment]

A satisfactory smile spread across his face looking at the icon of the outfit. Without a second thought he pulled it out.

A box materialized from thin air. He laid it on the ground in front of Sianna and said. "My queen, why not try these on? I bet this will look tremendous on you."

Sianna. "Tsk."

Jax opened the box and pulled the contents out one by one. First the bunny headband with two tall ears. Then a small bow. Then came the best part, the black top designed to cover her genitals with a fluffy bunny tail attached at the back. And lastly, a pair of black netted stockings to make it complete.

He thanked the system internally. This would be great help if his motivation or fuel started running low.

Then he noticed Sianna crushing the headband in her grip, her anger putting more force into that squeeze than she had put into any attack today.

Jax grabbed her hand tightly and said with flat tone. "Don’t make me say it twice. Before the oath gets a chance to punish you, I will do it myself. And I’ll make sure you realize what happens when you get on my nerves."

She was still cursing him under every breath but the reality of her situation was staring her in the face. There was no way around this. So she swallowed her pride and told herself she would make him pay tenfold when this was over.

For now, she put on the bunny headband. Then stood up, reached for the black top and pulled it on from below. And lastly the netted black stockings sliding up her pale legs.

The moment she was finished, Jax grabbed her by the waist and leaned her back slightly. His hand raised her right leg while they both stood and rested it on his shoulder, stretching her body out into a full split against him.

He said. "See? That was pretty easy, wasn’t it? And for the rest of the day, please don’t spoil my mood. I’m a relatively stable person. And who knows what might happen to your duchy when they hear their duchess died during a beast subjugation by a wild beast."

Saying so he released the support holding her up. Sianna’s instincts kicked in and her arms wrapped around his neck to keep herself from falling. Meanwhile his hand found the bottom of the tight top and squeezed, pulling the fabric tight enough to press against her pussy and send a jolt through her body.

Then after making the fabric wet and loose enough, he sided it with his fingers to reveal the welcoming entrance underneath.

"Perfect." He muttered, scanning the full picture. The position. The outfit. The moonlit scenery. And of course the figure and exposed pussy of Sianna dressed as his personal bunny on a cliff edge.

He positioned his dick to start the farming session. The lips of his cock kissed her pussy lips, warm meeting wet, and just as the first push was about to happen, he sensed it. Dense mana. Coming at him fast.

His survival instincts fired and he separated from Sianna instantly as an arrow ripped through the exact spot where his head had been a fraction of a second ago.

Jax was totally pissed. He wasn’t able to start and was interrupted again. He looked in the direction of the shot with pure rage in his eyes and found Sianna’s daughter standing thirty meters away. Holding a sleek bow with a murderous expression on her face.

Before either Jax or Delphine could unleash their anger, Sianna spoke first. "Delphine! How dare you defy my command?!"

Delphine said for the first time in her life refusing her mother, her voice louder than it had ever been with her. "Mother, I can’t stand it anymore! You can give me any punishment you want! Even execution! But I will not let him touch you anymore! I will split him in two right here and now!"

She pulled the bowstring. An arrow formed automatically, aimed at Jax’s chest.

Sianna said. "Stop it! Think calmly! There is no way this bastard will go down that easily! He can order me to kill you, or myself, or do something far more terrible!"

Delphine’s eyes were dead serious. Still aiming. "Then so be it. I would rather die than do nothing."

She added. "But I promise I will take him down with me before he lays another hand on you."

Her voice shook with fury. "You monster. How dare your corrupted mind come up with the guts to do this to my mother. How dare you let me hear her scream. How dare you make my eyes witness this vile act."

Her fingers tightened on the string. "You will pay for it with your life."

She released the arrow. In that instant Jax grabbed his sword from the ground and dashed toward her, dodging the arrow mid-sprint. He closed the distance in seconds and pointed his sword directly at Delphine’s head.

Sianna screamed from behind. "NO! Don’t do it!"

Jax ignored her and slammed his sword forward. Delphine squeezed her eyes shut in fear, bracing for the end.

But there was no pain. No impact.

She opened her eyes and found Jax inches from her face. His sword had gone right past her pointed vampire ears without touching them. Then a gurgling scream erupted from behind her. The sound of something choking on steel.

She turned and saw Jax’s sword had pierced straight through the mouth and out the throat of a dire wolf that had been lunging at her from behind. Its jaws were frozen mid-bite, inches from where her neck had been.

He had just saved her life. When he could have easily let her die.

Delphine didn’t ask why he did it. Because the grudge she carried was still burning too hot to let gratitude in. She turned back to face him with vengeful eyes.

And met his cold ones.

He pulled the sword out. Blood showered across Delphine’s shoulder as the beast collapsed behind her.

His voice came out flat and hollow. With a face that carried nothing but the truth.

"Vile? Sinful? A monster? It truly is a beautiful hypocrisy. When your mother held the leash and choked the life out of the innocent, your world called it nobility and grace. But the second I rip that very same leash from her hands and wrap it around her throats, suddenly it’s a sin."

He rested his sword on his shoulder. "You can call me whatever you want. But I am simply the reflection of your mother’s sins. Finally coming home to collect the debt."
